caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS" printed in gold across the chest, and a gold watch sits at a dark table in a studio setting. He is positioned in front of a white backdrop featuring the "UNIQUE HUSTLE" logo and the phrase "Where BOSSES Talk!". To his right is a professional microphone on a boom arm and a black container with a red and blue label that reads "TALK OUT MY GAME". In the bottom left corner of the scene, a small circular logo with "TALK" is visible. Across the sequence, the man is captured mid-speech, gesturing with his hands as he looks toward someone off-camera to his right. His expression and hand positions shift slightly as he speaks, but his overall posture and the surrounding environment remain constant.
